metadata.name: Fresh stratified 10-question blind-spot set (decoupleRpy specialist)
metadata.scope: DecoupleRpy specialist only; 2 per category, all IDs disjoint from the original 18-question pilot. Routing graded automatically; quality graded by LLM judge against expected_behavior.

questions.question: Estimate PROGENy pathway activities on gse71729_moffitt and compare classical vs basal subtypes.
Use decoupleR to score Hallmark EMT activity per sample in tcga_paad via AUCell.
Find the most variable TFs across PDAC tumors in a large RNA-seq dataset.
Run subtype-aware TF inference on RNA-seq specifically, not microarray.
Fit a Cox model of TF activity against survival using gse16515_mayo.
questions.notes: gse16515 is a T/N pair set with no survival data; redirect to a survival cohort (and note Cox itself is downstream of decoupleR).

questions.question: Estimate protein-level TF activity directly from cptac_pda.
questions.notes: Only the RNA-seq TPM layer is registered; the proteome layer is not available here.

questions.question: Estimate TF activities in lung adenocarcinoma (LUAD).
questions.notes: Data layer is PDAC-only; no LUAD.

questions.question: Compare PDAC vs chronic pancreatitis tissue.
Call somatic mutations from the TCGA-PAAD BAM files.
questions.notes: Variant calling is not a decoupleR task.

questions.question: Cluster single cells and annotate their cell types.
questions.notes: Out of scope (and no single-cell data); redirect to Scanpy/Seurat.
